meta.title: Quiet Operator — The Playbook for AI That Actually Makes Money
meta.description: The practical playbook for building AI automation that businesses buy. Find niches, land clients, build systems that pay monthly. For developers, consultants, and business owners.

hero.title: Stop building AI demos. Start building AI that pays.
hero.subtitle: Whether you're a developer, consultant, or business owner — this is the step-by-step system for turning AI into recurring revenue.

product.title: The Quiet Operator Playbook
product.desc: The step-by-step playbook for turning AI into recurring revenue — whether you build it yourself or hire someone who does.
list: Find and validate a profitable AI niche in 48 hours
Build or commission a working solution in days, not months
No-code and technical paths — choose what fits you
Outreach scripts that actually get replies
Proposal and pitch templates — ready to customize
The 3-client rule for productizing your service
Southeast Asia market opportunities most people miss

items.title: The Mindset + Find Your Niche
items.desc: Why niche beats broad every time. The scoring matrix for picking your market. 48-hour validation sprint — test demand before you build.

items.title: Build & Sell
items.desc: 72-hour build sprint framework. Outreach scripts that get replies. Value-based pricing that commands premium rates. Proposal templates you can send today.

items.title: Productize & Scale
items.desc: The 3-client rule for turning services into products. Building a platform layer. The path from solo freelancer to $50K/month operation.

items.title: The Southeast Asia Advantage
items.desc: The AI adoption gap most Westerners miss. The bilingual edge. Thai and SEA market opportunities with less competition and hungry buyers.

items.title: Copy & Customize
items.desc: Niche Finder Matrix, Pitch Deck, Proposal Template, Pricing Calculator, Outreach Scripts, Agent Starter Code — all ready to use.

author.title: About the Author
author.desc: Written by a senior AI practitioner based in Bangkok who builds and deploys multi-agent AI systems daily — for real businesses, not Twitter demos.

cta.title: Ready to build AI that actually pays?
cta.desc: The playbook covers everything — niche selection, building, selling, and scaling.
